name: Entry & Visa Desk
shortBio: Maintains traveler-facing coverage on visa basics, transit policies, re-entry questions, and arrival-rule planning.
fullBio: The Entry & Visa Desk maintains editorial coverage related to visa basics, transit eligibility, re-entry logic, passport-linked planning, and entry-rule framing for travelers visiting China. Its goal is to explain the planning logic clearly while still directing readers to official sources for final rule confirmation.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for clarity, policy sensitivity, and whether the traveler-facing explanation still matches the current structure of entry and transit rules.
seoTitle: Entry & Visa Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains visa, transit, and China entry-planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
